title: Sweet Velvet Steak
description: A sweet and velvety Japanese dish featuring lean minced steak braised to perfection for a quick weeknight meal.
instructions: Heat oil in a pot over medium heat.
Add onion and garlic, sauté until soft.
Stir in mince, breaking it up with a wooden spoon as you cook for about 5 minutes or until browned.
Pour in ketchup, soy sauce, and mirin (if using). Stir well to combine.
Gradually pour in water, stirring occasionally. The mixture will boil initially but reduce the heat once boiling.
Simmer gently for about 10-12 minutes until thickened and tender.
Add finely chopped parsley just before serving.
